human_task_name: SynAIpse CC1: final adversarial review of closed recommendation effects
objective: Independently find a concrete remaining defect in the CC1 repaired versioned recommendation-effects validator or its QA fallback evidence, or write a packet-bound no-finding review for immutable target 63188bcda5855424b2db48f075397e0b938bb73b.

decision_frame.value: Final local adversarial boundary before the PM can decide whether CC1 may be admitted or remains blocked.
decision_frame.why_now: The P2 closed-key repair and governed deterministic QA fallback are preserved at immutable target 63188bcda5855424b2db48f075397e0b938bb73b.
acceptance_criteria: Review independently tests the exact repaired SHA.
Review challenges closed nested recommendation fields, additive outer meta and legacy operational metadata, and producer/consumer compatibility.
Result either contains assertion-shaped finding(s) or an explicit no-finding verdict and binds the target SHA.
decision_frame.risk_or_learning_target: A close-key repair must not silently break deliberately additive legacy operational metadata or leave another malformed-envelope bypass.
decision_frame.smallest_increment: One fresh final adversarial artifact and strict child result.

non_goals: Do not edit source, tests, packets, prior artifacts, commit, branch, or worktree.
Do not use network, mutate hosted state, push, merge, rebase, reset, stash, clean, or delete anything.

validation_entrypoints: pnpm exec vitest run src/lib/decision/harness-decision.test.ts src/commands/next-decision-meta.test.ts src/commands/next-fitness-report.test.ts --reporter=dot

delegated_decision_rights: Read and test the immutable target only.
Write only the declared review artifact/result or report a packet-bound blocker.
